meaning: n.布鲁克林(美国纽约市西南部的一区)
examples: Police raided five houses in Brooklyn and recovered stolen goods.
Miss Brown and her friend, both from Brooklyn, were arrested on the 8th of June.
His family escaped to Brooklyn before the bridge closed.
He earned a degree in broadcast journalism from Brooklyn College and also attended Louisiana State University.
The Brooklyn Cyclones have 25 remaining games on their home turf through 1 September.
